summary: Frontend-only testing of WYSIWYG document editor hover-based KalkulationPanel feature. All 12 features tested and working correctly. The right sidebar now shows KalkulationPanel on position hover, Vorlagen section on toolbar button toggle, and default view (hover hint + Dokument-Kalkulation) otherwise.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' - This is a React hydration warning but doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Right sidebar no longer has Vorlagen/Kalkulation tab switcher buttons
Hovering over a non-Titel position row shows KalkulationPanel in right sidebar
KalkulationPanel shows item name (e.g., 'Anfahrtskosten 1 Mitarbeiter 5 Km')
KalkulationPanel shows Zeitanteile fields (Meister, Geselle, Azubi, Helfer) with rates
KalkulationPanel shows VK-Preis (kalkuliert) and 'VK-Preis übernehmen' button
Moving mouse away from position row hides KalkulationPanel and shows default view
Hovering over a Titel row does NOT show KalkulationPanel
Clicking 'Vorlagen' button in top toolbar toggles the templates section in right sidebar
Übersicht section (Positionen count + Brutto) always visible in right sidebar
KalkulationPanel 'VK-Preis übernehmen' button updates the position price in the document (tested: 34.25€ -> 109.69€)
Editor works the same in Rechnungen (invoices) page - Vorlagen button and hover hint present
Left sidebar (Leistungen, Artikel, Blöcke) tabs all functional
Document drop zone exists for drag & drop
Save and Save & Exit buttons present and functional
Add Position and Add Titel buttons present
critical_code_review_comments: Hover-based KalkulationPanel implementation is clean with proper state management (hoveredKalkItem)
Position rows correctly have onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave handlers for desktop view
Titel rows correctly excluded from hover functionality (pos.type === 'titel' check)
Virtual items created for positions without source_article_id work correctly
Vorlagen toggle state (showVorlagen) properly managed in parent component
Minor: Console warning about <span> inside <option> in mobile select - cosmetic issue only
seed_data_creation: Modified position price in quote A-2026-0021 during testing (Anfahrtskosten: 34.25€ -> 109.69€)
context_for_next_testing_agent: WYSIWYG editor hover-based KalkulationPanel fully tested. Key test IDs: btn-vorlagen-topbar, hover-hint, hover-kalkulation-panel, kalkulation-panel, kalk-ek, kalk-h-meister, kalk-apply-btn, vorlagen-section. Test quote A-2026-0021 (c288214e-7f81-4832-8ccf-7fa863f65294) has Titel groups (Einrüstarbeiten, Dichtungsarbeiten) with positions. Orders page has 0 entries, Invoices page has 1 entry (R-2026-0015). Wage rates from settings: Meister=77€, Geselle=72€, Azubi=26€, Helfer=69€.
